## Description

Clearly describe what this PR does and why it's needed. Link any related issues.

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactor (code restructuring without changing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Configuration / theme change

## Testing

Describe how you tested your changes:

- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] Build succeeds with `npm run build`
- [ ] Linter passes with `npm run lint`
- [ ] Prettier passes with `npm run prettier`

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code in hard-to-understand areas (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works (if applicable)
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (if applicable)
- [ ] My commit messages follow the project's commit message convention
